file_insights.organization: Grouped by color category with XML comments

patterns_discovered.description: Colors prefixed with 'md_theme_' following MD3 specification pattern
Each primary color has a corresponding 'on' variant for text/foreground contrast
Primary, secondary, and tertiary colors include container and onContainer variants
patterns_discovered.rationale: Supports multiple layers of visual hierarchy in Material Design 3

patterns_discovered.description: Includes Material Design 2 colors (purple_200, teal_700) for backward compatibility
Colors logically organized into 8 categories: Primary, Secondary, Tertiary, Error, Background, Surface, Outline, Other

gotchas_discovered.description: Resource file contains light theme colors exclusively; dark theme variants would require separate file
gotchas_discovered.impact: Apps supporting dark mode will need additional colors_night.xml or colors_dark.xml

gotchas_discovered.description: Colors are hard-coded; no dynamic Material You (Android 12+) color extraction
gotchas_discovered.impact: Won't adapt to system accent colors on devices with Material You support

gotchas_discovered.description: Legacy colors use full hex notation with alpha (e.g., #FFBB86FC) while MD3 colors don't
gotchas_discovered.inconsistency: Potential confusion for developers unfamiliar with both formats

key_accomplishments: Created comprehensive Material Design 3 color palette
Included backward compatibility for Material Design 2
Maintained proper XML resource file structure
Added descriptive comments for each color group

recommendations.rationale: Essential for supporting dark mode; current file only supports light theme
recommendations.implementation: Create values-night/colors.xml with inverted contrast colors

recommendations.recommendation: Implement Material You dynamic colors for Android 12+
recommendations.rationale: Leverages system accent colors for cohesive theming on modern devices
recommendations.implementation: Add dynamic color extraction logic in theme setup for API 31+

recommendations.rationale: Helps team members understand when to use primary vs secondary vs tertiary colors
recommendations.format: Create internal style guide or design system documentation

recommendations.rationale: Create task-specific color names (e.g., success, warning, info) referencing base palette
Simplify resource file if Material Design 2 support is no longer needed
recommendations.impact: Reduces clutter but may break existing component styles
